ddls:
CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the actor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the actor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the actor */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent representing the actor */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the actor's profile picture */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of awards won by the actor */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actors_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the agent works for */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate charged by the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the movie */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie in millions */,
  "box_office" REAL /* Box office earnings of the movie in millions */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie's poster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for sub-genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the director */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of awards won by the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actor_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the role is in */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor playing the role */,
  "role_type" TEXT /* Type of the role (e.g., lead, supporting, cameo) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "screen_time" INTEGER /* Screen time of the actor in the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_roles_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_roles_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, producer, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., movie_id, actor_id) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_cast_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_cast_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
